description: Output schema for triage-scorer skill (flat format matching SKILL.md)

revised_classification.description: Required when verdict is disagree. Use the same classification enum as the skill being reviewed (e.g., confirmed, likely_fp, uncertain for SAST/CVE findings).

confidence.description: Your confidence in your verdict (agree/disagree), not the original agent's confidence.

reasoning.description: Why you agree or disagree. Cite specific gaps or strengths in the agent's evidence.
